name: Botvinia<cold, Green Vegetable Soup w/ Fish>
recipeIngredient: 1 large cucumber, peeled, halved, seeded and diced
1 1/2 lb poached sturgeon, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 1/2 lb poached whitefish, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil 3 quarts of water in a large pan.
2. When boiling briskly add the spinach and sorrel.
3. Cook uncovered at a brisk boil for 6-8 minutes.
4. Drain the water off, wash the vegetables in cold water, then puree in a blender.
5. Cool to room temperature.
6. Combine all ingredients except beer and vodka in a bowl.
7. When mixed well, slowly add the beer and vodka, stirring constantly.
8. Chill for a minimum of 2 hours before serving.
